From The Blaze! Straight From The Blaze! An Corp Buy Information Details An Corp is a revival of the text font from the 1997 MMORPG Ultima Online. Originally drawn in low resolution, the project seeks a balance between f

line’s former creative director Starr Long, the early font work was likely created by Micael Priest, who passed away in 2018. An Corp pays homage to his contribution and to the timeless, immersive world of Ultima Online.
